title: Add continuous caption OCR quality and sync evaluators
description: Add frame-region OCR, caption segmentation, readability, safe-area, jitter/flicker, density, OCR-vs-expected, and optional OCR-vs-ASR drift evaluation.
acceptance_criteria: caption.ocr.v1, caption.quality.v1, and caption.sync.v1 artifacts exist; configurable regions support split-screen shorts; fixtures cover drift, missing captions, bad placement, and over-dense captions.
close_reason: Implemented contracts, media probe/render gates, caption review scaffolding, and video-technical-review with tests.

title: Port technical signal analyzers from content-machine
description: Port reusable scene/cadence, freeze, black/white frame, edge/gutter, temporal, audio signal, and optical-flow quality checks out of content-machine.
acceptance_criteria: Each analyzer emits structured metrics plus gate results; optional Python/helper dependencies are detected and skipped or failed by policy; current content-machine issue codes are preserved where applicable.
close_reason: Added reusable technical signal helpers for scene cadence, freeze/black/white frames, edge/gutter artifacts, temporal duplicate/flicker, and audio summaries; integrated them into video-technical-review.

title: Add media probe and render-quality gates
description: Port common ffprobe and render checks into reusable video-evaluator primitives covering dimensions, streams, codecs, pixel format, duration, fps, file size, and audio presence.
acceptance_criteria: media.probe.v1 and quality.gates.v1 are emitted; tests cover missing streams, invalid metadata, audio/video duration mismatch, wrong resolution, and unsupported codecs.
close_reason: Implemented contracts, media probe/render gates, caption review scaffolding, and video-technical-review with tests.

title: Add analyze-video and analyze-bundle orchestrators
description: Add top-level orchestration tools that run available probes and evidence extractors, preserve skipped/failed/abstained checks, and emit analyzer.report.v1.
acceptance_criteria: analyze-video and analyze-bundle produce analyzer.report.v1 with status, confidence, issues, artifact paths, evidence refs, and clear skipped reasons.
close_reason: Implemented analyze-video/analyze-bundle orchestration with analyzer.report.v1 outputs, child artifacts, harness runners, agent registration, docs, and tests.

title: Define canonical analyzer contracts and package boundaries
description: Create schema-versioned contracts and stable module boundaries for analyzer requests, media probes, timeline evidence, quality gates, caption reports, visual diffs, demo evidence, and analyzer reports.
acceptance_criteria: Zod schemas and docs exist; package exports expose stable subpaths; import tests cover every exported surface.
close_reason: Implemented contracts, media probe/render gates, caption review scaffolding, and video-technical-review with tests.

title: Make video-evaluator the canonical shared video analyzer
description: Unify reusable video analysis from content-machine and demo-machine in video-evaluator while leaving product-specific policy in the consumer repos.
acceptance_criteria: All canonical contracts, analyzers, adapters, docs, and compatibility fixtures exist; content-machine and demo-machine can delegate shared video analysis to video-evaluator.

title: Add cross-repo compatibility fixtures and snapshots
description: Build fixture suites from content-machine and demo-machine outputs so migrated analyzer behavior can be compared before adapters switch over.
acceptance_criteria: Fixtures cover at least one CM short, one CM docs/demo MP4, one longform source clip, and one demo-machine captured run; snapshots assert old-to-new artifact mapping and gate parity.

title: Extend package review prompt and layout safety skill docs
description: Make evaluator outputs discoverable for coding agents by documenting layout-safety-review as a skill and including quality, caption, visual diff, screenshot, and timeline evidence in packaged review prompts.
acceptance_criteria: Skill catalog discovers layout-safety-review; package-review-prompt includes quality failures, visual diff summary, screenshot evidence, caption risk, timeline evidence, and the next artifact to inspect.

title: Add demo-machine capture, visual diff, and golden-frame gates
description: Normalize demo-machine events, verification, screenshots, cursor/target evidence, visual diffs, golden frames, phantom overlay checks, and chapter/assert screenshot checks into evaluator artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: demo.capture-evidence.v1 and visual.diff.v1 exist; golden-frame compare/update modes work; current demo-machine thresholds and artifact paths can be preserved by adapters.
close_reason: Implemented demo visual and golden-frame gates with visual-diff JSON reports, compare/update modes, missing-baseline and dimension-mismatch handling, harnesses, docs, and tests.

title: Add video technical review and contact-sheet tool
description: Move reusable docs/demo audit behavior into video-evaluator: batch frame sampling, contact sheets, black/white frames, edge artifacts, low-motion runs, caption-band sparsity, and optional layout safety.
acceptance_criteria: video-technical-review emits video-technical.report.json and contact-sheet artifacts; preserves issue codes used by content-machine review:demo-videos; layout sidecars are included when present.
close_reason: Implemented video-technical-review contact-sheet parity, preserved content-machine issue codes/layout pass-through, added contact-sheet.png metadata coverage, and passed full evaluator typecheck/tests/build/smokes.

title: Add source media signals and source text guard
description: Add reusable source media auditing for longform and b-roll inputs, including ffprobe facts, audio energy, silence gaps, scene changes, representative frames, burned-in text risk, and direct-use/reference/reject recommendation.
acceptance_criteria: source-media-signals emits parity data needed by content-machine source-media-analysis.v1; source text guard reports persistent text/caption risk with evidence frames.
notes: 2026-04-29: Implemented first source-media-signals slice: ffprobe facts via existing probe, ffmpeg audio energy/silence with unavailable/failed status, video-shots scene estimates with frame-extraction fallback, representative frame evidence status, skill/harness/docs/tests. Not closed: remaining acceptance still needs real source text guard with persistent text/caption risk and evidence frames.
